name: moveDirectory
description: Move a directory and all its contents to a new path. Automatically handles cross-device moves by copying recursively then deleting the original.
intent: move a directory and all its contents to a new path
examples: Move the src/components/ directory into ui/components/
Relocate the docs folder into website/docs/
whenToUse: The source is a directory (contains children) and must land under a new parent.
Both endpoints are directories, not files.
The user wants the existing name to disappear after the move.
whenNotToUse: Only a single file needs to move. Use moveFile instead.
The user just wants it renamed within the same parent. Use renameDirectory instead.
The user wants to list or read the directory. Use listDirectory / scanDirectory / readFile instead.

oldPath.description: Current relative path of the directory to move

newPath.description: Destination relative path for the directory
